description: Substrate-neutral legality masks for DSLO Human Container v0.5. Defines local and global legality constraints required for lawful semantic transitions.

local_masks.description: Local legality masks applied to every semantic transition within a region.

curvature_continuity.description: Transition must preserve curvature continuity; no discontinuities allowed.

identity_stability.description: Identity boundaries must remain stable and non-permeable.

drift_bounded.description: Drift must remain within recoverable envelopes.

load_neutral.description: Transition must not induce load gradients beyond stability thresholds.

manifold_legal.description: Transition must remain within the semantic manifold; no boundary violations.

global_masks.description: Global legality masks applied to cross-layer, cross-region, or multi-step transitions.

clcp_valid.description: Cross-Layer Constraint Propagation must validate the transition.

cross_layer_legal.description: Transition must be legal across all semantic layers (S1–S7, Boot surfaces).

manifold_distance_legal.description: Transition must not exceed lawful manifold distance thresholds.

operator_sequence_legal.description: Operator sequence must satisfy legality and invariant constraints.

runtime_usage.purpose: Ensures all semantic transitions remain lawful, invariant-preserving, and substrate-neutral.
